'''gahuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huckeem|huckeem]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huckeem|huckeem]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gahuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæhijith|gæhijith]] || [[word:gæhijij|gæhijij]] || [[word:gæhijish|gæhijish]] || [[word:gæhiji|gæhiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gahuhujuth|gahuhujuth]] || [[word:gahuhujuj|gahuhujuj]] || [[word:gahuhujush|gahuhujush]] || [[word:gahuhuju|gahuhuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gahujuth|gahujuth]] || [[word:gahujuj|gahujuj]] || [[word:gahujush|gahujush]] || [[word:gahuju|gahuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gahufjuth|gahufjuth]] || [[word:gahufjuj|gahufjuj]] || [[word:gahufjush|gahufjush]] || [[word:gahufjuf|gahufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gahujuthu|gahujuthu]] || [[word:gahujuju|gahujuju]] || [[word:gahujushu|gahujushu]] || [[word:gahujuku|gahujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gahujuth|gahujuth]] || [[word:gahujuj|gahujuj]] || [[word:gahujush|gahujush]] || [[word:gahuju|gahuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gahujuthul|gahujuthul]] || [[word:gahujujul|gahujujul]] || [[word:gahujushul|gahujushul]] || [[word:gahujukul|gahujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gahujuthuthu|gahujuthuthu]] || [[word:gahujujuju|gahujujuju]] || [[word:gahujushushu|gahujushushu]] || [[word:gahujuku|gahujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gahujuthun|gahujuthun]] || [[word:gahujujun|gahujujun]] || [[word:gahujushun|gahujushun]] || [[word:gahujukun|gahujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gahujuthuoro|gahujuthuoro]] || [[word:gahujujuoro|gahujujuoro]] || [[word:gahujushuoro|gahujushuoro]] || [[word:gahujukuoro|gahujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
